data.content: Plan: adjust Settings > Advanced > Agent Pools row layout so all percentage bars share a fixed left origin and common track width, even with long model names; truncate agent/model labels to a bounded width; display both raw weight and computed percent next to bars; keep existing pool edit behavior and persistence. Files: src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx (row layout + display text). Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
